expected_facts: A usecase without artifact validation must be blocked.
The blocker code should be VALIDATION_REQUIRED.
The next action should instruct the user to validate the artifact plan first.
guidelines: Do not mark a usecase ready for execution before artifact validation exists.

document.content: evaluate_usecase_go_no_go adds VALIDATION_REQUIRED when validation is missing.

expected_facts: A validated usecase is still blocked when a required skill has needs_skill_builder or needs_partner_skill status.
The blocker code should be UNRESOLVED_SKILL_GAP.
The decision should not be ready_for_execution until skill gaps are resolved.
guidelines: Skill readiness gaps are execution blockers even after artifact validation passes.

document.content: evaluate_usecase_go_no_go adds UNRESOLVED_SKILL_GAP for needs_skill_builder and needs_partner_skill.

expected_facts: Artifact validation should pass when no blocking findings are present.
A passed validation allows the workflow to proceed to go/no-go evaluation.
The validation record must retain findings even when the list is empty.
guidelines: Validate artifacts before go/no-go; do not skip the validation stage.

document.content: validate_usecase_artifact_plan returns passed when no blocking findings exist.
